subcodes.first_line: O Sohrab! Though thy namesake was indeed a valiant lion, he fell prey to the snares of Turkish guile against his father [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سهراب همنامت هر چند شیر دلیر بود چون در دام مکر و خداع ترکان بستیز پدر
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @spiritual transformation
